page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The system operates with a single thread per core configuration, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. For external connectivity and data transfer, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Given its 1:2 memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated high-frequency CPU cores, this instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient option for processing-heavy tasks that rely on network-attached storage. Suitable workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, and compute-heavy application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.8xlarge is a compute-optimized x86_64 server instance powered by a 3.3 GHz Intel Xeon 6462C processor. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The hardware profile includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 2.0 GB of RAM per core, with no local storage or integrated GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This resource allocation makes the instance highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads such as batch processing, high-performance computing, and application serving where dedicated CPU performance is required and storage is managed externally.
